ogTitle: Gulmarrad vs Gum Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gulmarrad and Gum Flat.
heading: Gulmarrad vs Gum Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gulmarrad, New South Wales and Gum Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gulmarrad has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Gum Flat (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gulmarrad or Gum Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gulmarrad has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Gum Flat scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gulmarrad scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Gum Flat scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gulmarrad or Gum Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gulmarrad has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
